templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard mutual NDA covering confidentiality obligations between two parties evaluating a business relationship.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement - Cover Page
templates.description: Cover page that pairs with the Mutual NDA Standard Terms; captures the parties, purpose, term and governing law.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) governing access to a SaaS / cloud product, including support, data, payment, warranty and liability terms.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-access programs where a design partner gives feedback in exchange for product access.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement (SLA) defining target uptime, response time, service credits and remedies for a cloud service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) covering scoped services, deliverables, change orders, IP ownership, payment and indemnification.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement (DPA) for GDPR / UK GDPR compliance, including SCCs, subprocessor management and security incident response.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement granting a limited license to install and use software, with payment, warranty and IP terms.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement covering co-marketing or joint-business obligations, trademark licensing and revenue arrangements between two companies.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement granting limited access to a product for evaluation purposes prior to a longer-term commercial agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard HIPAA Business Associate Agreement (BAA) governing the handling of Protected Health Information by a service provider.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum supplementing a base agreement with terms for AI / ML services, covering inputs, outputs, model training and IP ownership.
